backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a chat backend with a `ChatMessage` type, storing up to 500 messages in memory, and exposing `getMessages(since)` and `postMessage` query/update calls.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing two requirements: integrating the ICP backend as the primary message store in `useBroadcastMessages.ts` (REQ-37) and ensuring all `ChatMessage` objects have a unique `id` field for deduplication (REQ-38).
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to short summaries describing each component, hook, utility, and type used in the chat application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell with a `#root` div and a module script tag loading `src/main.tsx` as the React app entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that reads the active session from localStorage on mount and conditionally renders `LandingPage` or `ChatPage`, with a loading spinner while checking auth state.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Comprehensive admin panel sheet with tabs for ban/mute management, mod log, broadcast messages, force-text, big messages, and server shutdown/startup controls, using multiple admin hooks and managers.
frontend/src/components/AIChatButton.tsx: Floating button in the bottom-right corner that opens the G.AI chat panel; hides itself when the panel is already open.
frontend/src/components/AIChatPanel.tsx: Private AI chat panel powered by OpenAI ChatGPT that maintains full conversation history, requires an API key (stored in localStorage), and renders a key-setup screen if none is configured.
frontend/src/components/ChatArea.tsx: Renders the main chat message list with grouped messages, big message banners, avatar colors, pinned message bar, and MOTD banner, auto-scrolling to new messages.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmationToas: Displays a temporary toast notification with confirm and dismiss buttons for destructive actions, auto-dismissing after 5 seconds.
A textarea-based message input component that enforces ban, mute, slow mode, chat lock, server shutdown, and shadowban restrictions before sending messages.
frontend/src/components/MOTDBanner.tsx: Renders a dismissible Message of the Day banner at the top of the chat area with a megaphone icon and blue styling.
frontend/src/components/OwnerShutdownBan: Shows an amber warning banner for the owner during server shutdown, displaying a countdown and a button to start the server back up immediately.
frontend/src/components/PinnedMessageBar: Displays a compact bar showing the currently pinned message's author and text, with an optional dismiss button.
frontend/src/components/SecretEmojiPicke: A hidden emoji picker panel with 80 curated emojis, toggled via Ctrl+Alt, that closes on Escape or outside click and inserts the selected emoji.
Full-screen black overlay shown to non-owner users during server shutdown, displaying a pulsing red indicator, shutdown message, and countdown timer.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Renders the Discord-style sidebar with a channel list and a live online users list tracked via localStorage presence heartbeats.
frontend/src/components/StartupOverlay.t: Full-screen green overlay displayed while the server is starting up, showing a spinning loader and animated bounce dots.
frontend/src/components/TopBar.tsx: Renders the top navigation bar with channel info, online user count (read from localStorage presence), admin panel button, and logout button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminCommands.ts: Provides a collection of admin command callbacks (ban, mute, pin, slow mode, lock chat, etc.) that manipulate localStorage admin state and broadcast events.
Watches incoming chat messages for @G.ai mentions and sends the question to OpenAI, posting the response as a bot message.
frontend/src/hooks/useBanManager.ts: Manages a localStorage-backed ban list with 10-minute expiry, exposing hooks to ban, unban, and check ban status for users.
Manages chat message state by syncing with localStorage, a BroadcastChannel for cross-tab updates, and polling the ICP backend every 2 seconds for new messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatLock.ts: Tracks the chat-locked admin state by reading from adminState and subscribing to broadcast control events.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatModeration.ts: Monitors new non-bot messages and uses OpenAI moderation to auto-ban users who send flagged content, logging violations to the mod log.
Handles a Ctrl+C keyboard shortcut (outside inputs) that shows a confirmation toast and clears chat messages on a second 'c' keypress within 5 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useEmojiPickerShortcu: Toggles the emoji picker visibility via a Ctrl+Alt keyboard shortcut.
frontend/src/hooks/useHighlights.ts: React hook that tracks active user highlights from adminState, subscribes to broadcast events for updates, and prunes expired entries every 10 seconds. Exposes a helper to check if a specific user is highlighted and what color.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login status, identity persistence, and delegation validity. Exports InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity for use throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useMOTD.ts: React hook that manages the Message of the Day state, syncing with adminState via broadcast events and allowing local dismissal. Returns the current MOTD message (or null if dismissed) and a dismiss callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useMuteManager.ts: Manages a localStorage-backed mute list with expiry timestamps, providing callbacks to mute, unmute, check mute status, and query remaining mute duration for users. Also exports getActiveMutes for reading all active mutes outside React.
frontend/src/hooks/usePinnedMessages.ts: React hook that reads the currently pinned message from adminState and listens for broadcast 'pinned' events to stay in sync. Returns the pinned message ID or null.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty compatibility stub retained from a template; all data management has been moved to the useBroadcastMessages hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useServerState.ts: React hook that manages server shutdown/startup state, including a countdown timer, cross-tab broadcast synchronization, and a 5-second startup overlay. Exposes shutdown and startup action callbacks along with derived state values.
frontend/src/hooks/useShadowban.ts: React hook that tracks the list of shadowbanned users from adminState and listens for broadcast 'shadowban' events. Returns whether the given username is shadowbanned and the full list.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlowMode.ts: React hook that enforces slow-mode cooldowns per user using localStorage timestamps, syncing slow-mode settings via broadcast events. Exposes canSend, remainingCooldown, and a recordSend callback.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, applies Tailwind directives, defines a Discord-inspired dark theme via CSS custom properties, and adds custom scrollbar styles plus slide-in animations for messages and panels.
frontend/src/lib/adminState.ts: Centralized localStorage-backed store for admin-controlled chat features (pinned messages, slow mode, chat lock, MOTD, highlights, shadowban, theme), with each setter broadcasting changes over a BroadcastChannel. Provides typed getters and setters for all features.
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Handles user authentication using localStorage, including account creation, login with obfuscated password hashing, and session management. Seeds a default 'AI.Caffeine' owner account on module load.
frontend/src/lib/broadcastControl.ts: Singleton utility wrapping a BroadcastChannel for cross-tab server control events, exposing subscribe, unsubscribe, and broadcast functions.
frontend/src/lib/caffeineAI.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/lib/exportChatLog.ts: Reads chat messages from localStorage and triggers a JSON file download of the chat log.
frontend/src/lib/modLog.ts: Manages a moderation log stored in localStorage, supporting get, add, and clear operations with a 100-entry cap.
frontend/src/lib/openai.ts: Provides OpenAI API key storage, a chat completion wrapper using gpt-4o-mini, and a content moderation helper that flags disrespectful messages.
frontend/src/lib/serverState.ts: Manages server shutdown/startup state via localStorage, including timed shutdowns, auto-restore on expiry, and countdown formatting utilities.
frontend/src/lib/userBadges.tsx: Exports a helper to identify the verified owner username and a Crown badge tooltip component displayed next to that user's name.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Main chat page component composing the sidebar, top bar, chat area, message input, AI panel, admin panel, and shutdown/startup overlays with associated hooks.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Authentication landing page with togglable login and account creation forms, delegating to the auth library and calling onJoin on success.
frontend/src/types/chat.ts: Defines the ChatMessage interface used throughout the app, including fields for bot, system, broadcast, and display variant flags.
frontend/src/utils/sampleMessages.ts: Generates a set of sample chat messages from fictional users and seeds them into localStorage if no messages exist yet.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining a Discord-inspired color palette, custom fonts, shadcn/ui CSS variable tokens, border radius, animations, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state document (version 17) describing the Global Chat app's features, architecture (BroadcastChannel + localStorage, Caffeine AI SDK, OpenAI moderation), known issues, and a full list of implemented features including auth, admin commands, shutdown system, and AI chatbot integration.
